subtitle.en: A complete user verification toolkit: send OTPs via SMS/WhatsApp, verify codes, and validate phone formats — all through a single REST API.
subtitle.pt: Kit completo de verificação: envie OTPs via SMS/WhatsApp, verifique códigos e valide números — tudo em uma única API REST.
subtitle.es: Kit completo de verificación: envíe OTPs vía SMS/WhatsApp, verifique códigos y valide números — todo en una única API REST.
subtitle.id: Toolkit verifikasi lengkap: kirim OTP via SMS/WhatsApp, verifikasi kode, dan validasi format nomor — semuanya melalui satu REST API.
subtitle.ar: مجموعة أدوات تحقق كاملة: إرسال OTP عبر SMS/واتساب والتحقق من الرموز والتحقق من صيغة الرقم — كل ذلك عبر واجهة REST API واحدة.
subtitle.tr: Eksiksiz doğrulama araç seti: SMS/WhatsApp ile OTP gönderin, kodları doğrulayın ve numara biçimini kontrol edin — hepsi tek bir REST API ile.

body.en: Deliver OTP codes with smart failovers. Tries WhatsApp first for higher conversion rates and automatically falls back to transactional SMS if not delivered in 30 seconds.

bullets.en: Global E.164 phone number formatting checks

body.en:
Authentication

All API requests require your secret API key passed in the X-API-Key header. You can generate keys inside your developer dashboard.

X-API-Key: sm_live_your_api_key_here

Base URL

Submit all API payloads to the following root address:

https://api.startmessaging.com

description.en: Generate and dispatch a one-time password code to a phone number. Customize template placeholders easily.
Validate the code entered by the user. Simple 1-call verification that checks request expiration.
Fetch the real-time delivery status of the SMS or WhatsApp message.
Enforces rate-limits, carrier risk lookups, and device rules to mitigate fake signups.

snippets.code:
package main

import (
  "bytes"
  "encoding/json"
  "fmt"
  "net/http"
  "io"
)

func main() {
  payload, _ := json.Marshal(map[string]interface{}{
    "requestId": "req_abc123",
    "otpCode":   "123456",
  })

  req, _ := http.NewRequest("POST", "https://api.startmessaging.com/otp/verify", bytes.NewBuffer(payload))
  req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
  req.Header.Set("X-API-Key", "sm_live_your_api_key_here")

  resp, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
  defer resp.Body.Close()

  body, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
  fmt.Println(string(body))
}

body.en:
Response Formats

The Send OTP response returns confirmation status and unique identifiers:

{
  "success": true,
  "statusCode": 201,
  "requestId": "req_abc123",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-15T10:30:00.000Z",
  "data": {
    "otpRequestId": "uuid-of-otp-request",
    "messageId": "uuid-of-message",
    "status": "queued"
  }
}

The Verification response returns boolean confirmation value:

{
  "success": true,
  "statusCode": 200,
  "requestId": "req_xyz789",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-15T10:31:00.000Z",
  "data": {
    "verified": true
  }
}

question.en: What verification methods does the Auth API support?

answer.en: The Auth API supports: 1) OTP verification via SMS, 2) OTP verification via WhatsApp, 3) WhatsApp-first with SMS fallback, 4) Phone number format validation, and 5) Carrier/reachability lookup. All methods are available through a single unified API.

heading.en: Add User Verification to Your App
